name_en: ❤️Classic Dark Birch Brown Backpack, retro yet playful, very charming💞. It stays ahead of trends even after 10 years of use. Retro and classic, full of that British style from Burberry💖. Crafted in an Italian workshop. Features Burberry check, leather trim with topstitching, and a cotton blend lining. Features a drawstring closure, leather top handle, and a front zip pocket. Made with imported bull calf leather💖.
